dialogueChunks.intro: They're home, {player_name}. After everything, they're finally home.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: When {target_npc} walked through the gates, the whole settlement stopped. People who'd given up hope were weeping. {target_npc} is thin and scarred, but their eyes are bright. They told stories by the fire last night: about the days in the dark, the fear, the stubborn refusal to give up hope.
dialogueChunks.outro: You brought back someone we'd already mourned. There's no payment that matches that, but take this and know you'll never want for a warm fire here.

dialogueChunks.intro: You found them, {player_name}. Alive, changed, but alive.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is recovering in the healer's care. The time alone changed them: they're quieter, more watchful. The healers say the physical wounds will mend, but the time in captivity left deeper marks. Still, when I sat beside them and held their hand, they squeezed back.
dialogueChunks.outro: Recovery will be slow, but it starts today because of you. Take this with the gratitude of every person who loves {target_npc}.

dialogueChunks.intro: You found the truth, {player_name}. It wasn't the answer I wanted, but it was the one I needed.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} didn't vanish because of the {enemy_type_plural}. They left by choice: overwhelmed by obligations, by the weight of being needed by too many people. You found them living quietly {location_hint}, healthy and at peace. They asked me not to be angry. They sent back {quest_item} and a letter explaining everything.
dialogueChunks.outro: The answer wasn't tragedy. It was just a person who needed to breathe. The truth was worth more than any rescue.
